title: Tosca
subtitle: Giacomo Puccini
description: Puccini's iconic verismo opera returns to La Scala. A singer, a painter, a corrupt police chief — Rome in 1800. Conducted by the resident maestro; new staging by the season's director.

title: Il lago dei cigni
subtitle: Swan Lake — Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky
description: Tchaikovsky's defining ballet, in the version that made it canon. The corps de ballet of Teatro alla Scala dances the white acts; principals announced closer to opening.

title: Arlecchino servitore di due padroni
subtitle: Carlo Goldoni — regia Giorgio Strehler
description: Piccolo Teatro's signature production, in continuous repertory since 1947. Goldoni's commedia dell'arte masterpiece, in the staging that defined Italian theatre after the war.

title: Notre Dame de Paris
subtitle: Riccardo Cocciante & Luc Plamondon
description: The musical phenomenon based on Victor Hugo's novel, performed in Italian. Touring production stops at Arcimboldi for a limited run.

title: Concerto di Pasqua
subtitle: Orchestra I Pomeriggi Musicali
description: The orchestra's traditional Easter program at Teatro Dal Verme. Sacred music for chorus, soloists and orchestra. Conductor and program TBA.

title: Elektra
subtitle: Richard Strauss
description: Strauss's one-act tragedy after Hofmannsthal. Mythic Greek revenge in 100 unbroken minutes of orchestral violence. A defining 20th-century opera.
